title: Spicy Vermicelli Stir Fry
description: A quick and spicy stir fry made with vermicelli, perfect for a weeknight dinner. You can adjust the level of spiciness to your liking.

ingredients.name: banchan
ingredients.notes: such as kimchi or cucumber kimchi

instructions: Cook the vermicelli according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat a small pot over medium heat. Add the spicy and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the banchan to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes until slightly caramelized.
Add the onion or scallion to the pot and cook for another 2 minutes until softened.
Add the cooked vermicelli to the pot and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: add a sweet sauce such as gochujang or soy sauce to balance the spiciness.
